title: ITALY enforcement action against Piacenza Bar Association (3,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 3,000 on the Piacenza Bar Association. The controller is publishing a list with the names of all lawyers that had been suspended for disziplinary reasons. The controller did not remove the name of a lawyer after his suspension ended and only acted after...
